Configuration settings for the nrf52 target, including app, BSP, and build profile.

# Purpose
This configuration file specifies the build settings for a software project. The `target.app` key defines the application name as `app`. The `target.bsp` key sets the board support package (BSP) to `@apache-mynewt-core/hw/bsp/nordic_pca10056`, indicating the hardware platform for which the software is intended. The `target.build_profile` key is set to `debug`, which configures the build process to include debugging information, facilitating the development and troubleshooting of the application.
